productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Brown Wallet
description: A perfect blend of practicality and style, this wallet from lino perros comes in a woven pattern and with a copious zippered compartment to keep your currency away from your cards.Made of leather with a woven pattern on the front and backFront flap secured by a clasp button flapCard slots and organiser space One external zippered compartment with a dividerCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
